# .github Docs Index (Token-Optimized)

## Start Here
1. `copilot-instructions.md` — compact project contract.
2. `instructions/*.instructions.md` — focused implementation rules.
3. `skills/tenant-identity-skill.md` — segregation-specific checklist.
4. `agents/tenant-segregation-reviewer.md` — review agent for identity safety.

## Core Instruction Files
- `instructions/firebird-native-queries.instructions.md`
- `instructions/firebird-postgres.instructions.md`
- `instructions/api-integration.instructions.md`
- `instructions/api-structure.instructions.md`
- `instructions/spring-configuration.instructions.md`

## Why This Set Is Compact
- Removes duplicated long-form examples.
- Keeps only project-specific invariants and current implementation contracts.
- Reduces context/token overhead while preserving correctness constraints.
